Skills

Product thinking, AI systems, and technical depth for complex analyst workflows.

Product leadershipProduct ManagementHover or focus to explore

Framing user problems, setting product direction, and aligning technical teams and senior stakeholders around measurable outcomes.

  • Product strategy
  • Roadmapping
  • Prioritisation
  • Stakeholder alignment
AI systemsAgentic AIHover or focus to explore

Designing multi-agent workflows that turn raw data into analysis, hypotheses, and actionable outputs for human decision-makers.

  • Multi-agent systems
  • LLM evaluation
  • Prompt engineering
  • Workflow automation
Hands-on foundationTechnical SystemsHover or focus to explore

Prototyping data and cloud solutions directly, with enough engineering depth to make sound product and architecture decisions.

  • Python
  • SQL
  • AWS
  • Microsoft 365
  • Apache Spark
  • Hadoop / HDFS
Domain expertiseCybersecurity AnalyticsHover or focus to explore

Applying product, AI, and data methods to threat hunting, cloud anomaly detection, and security operations.

  • Threat hunting
  • Anomaly detection
  • Splunk
  • Elastic
  • Velociraptor
